dashboard.label: TLS Certificates
dashboard.description: TLS certs expiring soon and servers with insecure ciphers

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" | where field_name = "Days Until Expiration" or field_name="New Connections" |stats latest(_time) as _time by apex_dashboard | sort 0 - _time | head 1 | table apex_dashboard | rename apex_dashboard as url_token

html.a: Click here to visit the Apex dashboard

html.div:
No Apex Dashboard Available
No events received in the last 24 hours. Check your Apex configuration and ensure events are being sent to Splunk.
Configure Add-on Settings

chart.title: Cipher Suite Sessions Over Last 24 Hours

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name="New Connections" | where isnotnull(tls_cipher_suite) | timechart span=5m avg(current_value) by tls_cipher_suite

panel.title: Certificates Expiring Soon Found in Last 24 Hours

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name = "Days Until Expiration" | where isnotnull(ip_address_server) AND isnotnull(tls_serial_number) | rename ip_address_server AS "Server IP" tls_subject AS "TLS Subject" tls_serial_number AS "TLS Serial Number" | dedup "Server IP" "TLS Serial Number" | eval current_value=round(current_value,0) | rename current_value as "Days Until Expiration" | table "Server IP" application "Days Until Expiration" "TLS Subject" "TLS Serial Number" | sort - "Days Until Expiration"

panel.title: Servers Using Insecure Ciphers in the Last 24 Hours

search.query: sourcetype = "apex" index="*" field_name = "New Connections" | where isnotnull(ip_address_server) AND isnotnull(tls_cipher_suite) | stats sum(current_value) AS new_connections_sum by ip_address_server, tls_cipher_suite| eval new_connections_sum=round(new_connections_sum, 0) | eval "New Connections"=tostring(new_connections_sum, "commas") |rename ip_address_server AS "Server IP" tls_cipher_suite AS "TLS Cipher Suite" | sort - new_connections_sum | table "Server IP" "New Connections" "TLS Cipher Suite"
